column1: WHEN AND DOUBT ORAL VERSION IF USE OTHER NOTE IN NOTES

logP value from PubChem or ChEMBL
column3: Multiple reported values exist choose experimental if possible

column3: May be missing for some compounds

column2: Primary metabolic enzyme stated in FDA Clinical Pharmacology Review

column3: Often not reported leave blank if unavailable

column2: Second enzyme mentioned in metabolism section
Typical adult dose used in PK studies
column3: Some papers report multiple dose levels
Units sometimes reported as ug*h/L convert to ng*h/mL

column2: Adult Cmax value from PK study
column3: Units often vary convert to ng/mL

column2: Drug used in DDI study (example ketoconazole quinidine)
Increase in AUC during inhibitor study (example 3.2)
column3: Ensure it is fold change not percent
